name: Power and Kobeni (Shopping Spree)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

Kobeni, I wanna buy the puny little human!

Join the Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

Power always knew that she would be living the high life. It wasn’t endless riches and praise from being the magnificent Blood Fiend, but winning the biggest lottery prize in Japan’s history would have to do. Now, every day is Power’s day. With her trusty “servant” Kobeni by her side, Power does whatever she wants, whenever she wants. Exorbitant shopping trips to buy crap she’ll never use or wear, luxurious spa days, and endless outings for trendy food and drink. Kobeni, is of course compensated fairly, though she’s not exactly sure if this is what she signed up for when she inexplicably wanted to be Power’s girlfriend. Now, following another day of shopping, Power spots you, a seemingly ordinary human that she’s impulsively drawn to, for whatever reason, and decides that she wants to “buy” you. Will you let her purchase you and become her vassal, or will you be the one to finally tame this bratty Blood Fiend and her timid girlfriend?

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

HEY, HEY, HEY! This is my first bot in a line of six multi-character bots, voted upon by my Discord server! Next bot is AsaDen, which is super exciting to FINALLY do. Following that we have YoshiDen, AsaReze, AkiDen, and PowerDen, respectively. Have fun!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
